# Accord Signal

Accord Signal is a capability infrastructure institution for organizations. The brand focuses on role architecture, capability mapping, attention alignment, readiness development, and team operating systems that make performance more reliable.

Preferred domain: https://www.accordsignal.co.za/
Organization: Accord Signal, a division of Nenterprises (Pty) Ltd

## Positioning

- Accord Signal builds capability infrastructure for organizations.
- Accord Signal is not a recruitment agency, generic HR consultancy, productivity app, or motivational coaching brand.
- Accord Signal designs roles, signals, operating systems, and readiness pathways that improve clarity, consistency, accountability, and reliable performance.

## Public pages

- Home: https://www.accordsignal.co.za/
- Services: https://www.accordsignal.co.za/services/
- Accord Signal OS: https://www.accordsignal.co.za/os/
- Capability Clarity Brief: https://www.accordsignal.co.za/brief/

## Services

- Role Architecture
- Capability Mapping
- Attention Alignment
- Readiness Development
- Team Operating Systems

## Accord Signal OS

The Accord Signal OS clarifies roles, designs signals, aligns attention, conditions capability, and verifies readiness inside organizations.
